product: L-Acoustics Syva Low (low-frequency extension for the Syva system)

electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 142 dB peak at 1 m, half-space, with the [SYVA LOW SYVA] hybrid preset on LA4X, LA12X, or LA2Xi in bridge mode; 136 dB on a single-channel LA2Xi. Figure is for the full Syva-on-Syva-Low stack.
electroacoustic.directivity: Inherited from the Syva top element: nominally 140 degrees horizontal by +5/-21 degrees vertical (J-shape) above 1 kHz. The Syva Low extension is omnidirectional in its passband and adds no pattern control of its own.
electroacoustic.components: Syva Low extension cabinet: 2 x 12 inch LF cone drivers (K2-derived) in a bass-reflex enclosure with L-Vents. In the coupled stack it sits below a Syva top featuring 6 x 5 inch MF cone drivers and 3 x 1.75 inch HF compression drivers on DOSC waveguides.
electroacoustic.impedance_note: The 2.7 ohm value is the combined Syva + Syva Low load presented to one amplifier output when both are driven together via the [SYVA LOW SYVA] preset; the Syva Low extension cabinet alone is rated 4 ohms.

operating_modes: [SYVA LOW SYVA] hybrid preset, Syva and Syva Low driven from the same amplifier output (one channel per coupled pair)
Separated mode where Syva Low runs the [SYVA LOW_100] preset (LF up to 100 Hz) on its own channel while Syva runs the [SYVA] preset

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) on the Syva Low cabinet; pins 1+/1- carry LF. AutoConnect contact plate on top routes power up to a Syva placed directly on top.
connection.autoconnect: When Syva is stacked on Syva Low, AutoConnect passes audio/power through the connector plate: pins 1+/1- to LF, pins 2+/2- to Syva MF/HF. Do not use the speakON or screw terminals on the Syva top while AutoConnect is engaged.
connection.coupling_cable: If Syva is placed near (within 60 cm) rather than on top of Syva Low, an SP-Y1 splitter cable feeds both from the one amplifier output running the [SYVA LOW SYVA] preset.

physical.weight_note: 50 kg / 110 lb is the combined Syva + Syva Low stack; the Syva Low extension cabinet alone is 29 kg / 64 lb.
physical.dimensions_mm: 350 W x 334 D x 2128 H (full Syva-on-Syva-Low stack); Syva Low cabinet alone 350 W x 334 D x 849 H
physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic beech and birch plywood, coated steel grill with acoustically neutral 3D fabric; dark grey brown Pantone 426C standard, pure white RAL 9010 or custom RAL on order

modes: Ground-stacked, Syva top resting directly on the Syva Low base (AutoConnect engaged)
Ground-stacked on a Syva Base plate for added stability
deployment.max_per_flown_array: Not flown in this configuration; the coupled Syva-on-Syva-Low stack is a ground-stack only (1 stack per Syva Base)
rigging_accessories: Anti-vibration mats (supplied for ground-stacking the LF cabinet)
SyvaLF Cov (protective transport cover for Syva Low)

usage: Use Syva Low as the bass-reflex podium beneath a Syva colinear top to extend the system down to 42 Hz and add roughly 9 dB of low-frequency contour, turning Syva into a full-range medium-throw source.
Pair one Syva Low to one Syva for the standard coupled ratio; stack the Syva directly on top so AutoConnect handles the audio and power link with no external speaker cable between the two.
Drive the coupled pair from a single amplifier output using the [SYVA LOW SYVA] preset, so one stack consumes one channel; budget 2 channels per the per-enclosure planning in this calculator.
Plan amplifier loading at the configured channel counts: up to 4 Syva Low on an LA12X, 2 on an LA4X, 2 per LA2Xi (SE), and 8 on an LA7.16i.

The combined Syva + Syva Low load is about 2.7 ohms per driven output, so respect the per-output limits and never engage AutoConnect while also feeding the Syva top via its own speakON or screw terminals.
For deeper extension add Syva Sub at a 2:1:1 ratio (two Syva Sub per Syva Low + Syva), reaching down to 27 Hz; this stack is ground-stacked only, optionally on a Syva Base for stability.
source_manual: Syva Owner's Manual (EN) v1.0 (covers Syva, Syva Low, Syva Sub)
